---
title: "Group Analysis Scripts"
subtitle: "Working code from workshop groups"
---

Each working group has a subfolder here for their analysis scripts. Groups are free to organize their code however works best for them — the structure below is just a starting point.

## Groups

| Group | Case Study | Folder |
|-------|-----------|--------|
| Group A1 | Case Study A (Natural epidemic course) | `group-A1/` |
| Group A2 | Case Study A (Natural epidemic course) | `group-A2/` |
| Group B1 | Case Study B (Vaccine efficacy) | `group-B1/` |
| Group B2 | Case Study B (Vaccine efficacy) | `group-B2/` |

## Suggested Folder Structure

```
analysis/
├── group-A1/
│   ├── 01_explore_data.R
│   ├── 02_analysis_plan.md
│   ├── 03_competing_risks.R
│   └── 04_multistate_model.R
├── group-A2/
│   └── ...
├── group-B1/
│   └── ...
└── group-B2/
    └── ...
```

## Guidelines

- Use descriptive filenames prefixed with a number (e.g., `01_`, `02_`) to indicate order
- Add a short comment at the top of each script explaining what it does
- Commit regularly so your group members have access to the latest version
- If a script takes a long time to run, save output objects (`.rds` files) and commit those too
